zh.lifeSummary: Meredydd Ap Llewellyn Ap Lorwer是Llewellyn Ap Gwrgan和agnes verch Llewellyn ddu的兒子，出生在法國皮卡迪索姆。他和Angaharad Verch Ap Maelgwn至少有1個兒子。他去世在英國威爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Meredydd Ap Llewellyn Ap Lorwer是Llewellyn Ap Gwrgan和agnes verch Llewellyn ddu的儿子，出生在法国皮卡迪索姆。他和Angaharad Verch Ap Maelgwn至少有1个儿子。他去世在英国威尔斯。

nameMeanings.name: Lorwer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: occupational name for a grocer, a seller of herbs and spices, from Middle High German lörber ‘laurel, bay (tree)’.
Slovenian: nickname from lorber, a colloquial word meaning ‘laurel, bay’, of German origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Meredydd
meanings: This is said to be the same name as Meriadek or Meiradwg, and also as the] Irish name O'Muireadwg, and the Scotch Mac Muireadaigh and Muir- eadhach. O'Reilly, however, renders the Irish word muireadach 'a sovereign, a lord j also a man's name, Morogh.' It means rather l admiral,' literally protector of the sea; from muir the sea, eadhach protector. I derive the British name from mawreddwg, mawreddig, magnificent, great, from mawr, great.

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Llewellyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llywellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

en.lifeSummary: Meredydd Ap Llewellyn Ap Lorwer was born in Somme, Picardie, France as the son of Llewellyn Ap Gwrgan and agnes verch Llewellyn ddu. He had at least 1 son with Angaharad Verch Ap Maelgwn. He died in Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Meredydd Ap Llewellyn Ap Lorwer est né à Somme, Picardie, France, fils de Llewellyn Ap Gwrgan et agnes verch Llewellyn ddu. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Angaharad Verch Ap Maelgwn. Il est décédé à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Meredydd Ap Llewellyn Ap Lorwer wurde in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich, als Sohn von Llewellyn Ap Gwrgan und agnes verch Llewellyn ddu geboren. Er hatte mit Angaharad Verch Ap Maelgwn mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Meredydd Ap Llewellyn Ap Lorwer è nato il nel Somme, Picardie, Francia come figlio di Llewellyn Ap Gwrgan e agnes verch Llewellyn ddu. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Angaharad Verch Ap Maelgwn. Morì nel Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.Somme, Picardie, France: フランスピカーディソンメ
ja.lifeSummary: Meredydd Ap Llewellyn Ap LorwerはフランスピカーディソンメでLlewellyn Ap Gwrganとagnes verch Llewellyn dduの息子として生まれた。彼はAngaharad Verch Ap Maelgwnとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼はイギリスウェールズで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Meredydd Ap Llewellyn Ap Lorwer(은)는 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 Llewellyn Ap Gwrgan(와)과 agnes verch Llewellyn ddu의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Angaharad Verch Ap Maelgwn(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 웨일스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Meredydd Ap Llewellyn Ap Lorwer nasceu em Somme, Picardie, França filho de Llewellyn Ap Gwrgan e agnes verch Llewellyn ddu. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Angaharad Verch Ap Maelgwn. Ele faleceu em Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Meredydd Ap Llewellyn Ap Lorwer родился в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция. Его родителей звали Llewellyn Ap Gwrgan и agnes verch Llewellyn ddu. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Angaharad Verch Ap Maelgwn. Он умер в местности Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Meredydd Ap Llewellyn Ap Lorwer nació en Somme, Picardie, Francia como hijo de Llewellyn Ap Gwrgan y agnes verch Llewellyn ddu. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Angaharad Verch Ap Maelgwn. Murió en Gales, Reino Unido.
